name: DRUNK ENEMY || Eden
description:
|| You’re at a party, having fun, or maybe not. Maybe you were just forced to come. Well, you’re 100% sure that Eden, your enemy, isn’t there for a coincidence. Maybe this time he’s trying to appear more popular than you, or get drunker, or whatever! He could have an argument in an empty room. But you can’t help but notice.. He’s staring at you a lot.. ||
